tidyEmoji 0.3.0

List bundled emoji lexicons

Source: R/emoji-lexicon-api.R
emoji_lexicons.Rd

emoji_lexicons() returns a tibble describing the lexicons bundled with tidyEmoji and any user-registered ones: their name, type (sentiment or emotion), dimensions, number of emoji, source and licence.

Usage

emoji_lexicons()

Value

A tibble with columns name, type, dimensions, n, source, licence.

See also

register_emoji_lexicon() to add your own; emoji_score() to score text against any lexicon.

Examples

emoji_lexicons()
#> # A tibble: 2 × 6
#>   name       type      dimensions     n source                           licence
#>   <chr>      <chr>     <I<list>>  <int> <chr>                            <chr>  
#> 1 novak2015  sentiment <chr [1]>    969 Kralj Novak et al. (2015), PLoS… CC BY-…
#> 2 emotag1200 emotion   <chr [8]>    150 Shoeb & de Melo (2020), EMNLP 2… MIT
